subcodes.first_line: This is a Tablet that hath been sent down in truth and dispatched unto him who hath believed in God, the All-Subduing, the Self-Subsisting, on a Day whereon the heavens were cleft asunder [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: هذا لوح نزل بالحق و ارسل الی الذی آمن بالله المهیمن القیوم فی یوم فیه انفطرت
subcodes.subjects: @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @power of the Manifestation of God, @call to action, @Word of God and human limitations
